worlddownloader.config.title: World Downloader Settings
worlddownloader.config.desc.autoExportSe: Automatically export the world when leaving the server
worlddownloader.config.desc.autoExportSi: Automatically export singleplayer worlds when leaving the world (OFF = discard everything)
worlddownloader.config.desc.autoStartSer: Automatically start recording when joining a server (no need to press I)
worlddownloader.config.desc.autoStartSin: Automatically start recording when loading a singleplayer world (no need to press I)
worlddownloader.config.desc.exportWithTe: Include server texture pack in export
worlddownloader.config.desc.saveContaine: Save container inventories (chests, barrels, etc.) when exporting
